title: lithocarpus rizalensis
intro: Lithocarpus rizalensis, also known as Rizal beech or Philippine Lithocarpus, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, leaves, and roots, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The bark of Lithocarpus rizalensis is known for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which provide health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating pain. In terms of herbal preparations, the bark and leaves can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts that are used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
